request: Apply the pipeline follow-ups: fix stale Generator guide automation status, append push-status corrections for TASK-010/011, add final git-state enforcement script, and run a separate Tier 2 Generator -> Validator-A smoke test task.
request_original: docs/guides/generator-pipeline-ko.md stale 목록 수정, TASK-20260429-010/011 PENDING_PUSH CORRECTION, 별도 Tier 2 smoke test Task로 실제 Generator -> Validator-A 실행, 그리고 문서 보강 + scripts/check-final-git-state.mjs 추가 및 audit 연결 진행
tier_rationale: Multiple harness operational files and audit automation are changed. No product runtime, auth, DB, or production configuration changes.

include: a separate smoke-test Task ledger/spec/handoff artifacts
exclude: Main merge automation beyond existing repository policy

success_criteria: Generator pipeline guide no longer says Validator-A invocation, retry generation, and Conflict Report creation are manual-only.
TASK-20260429-010 and TASK-20260429-011 ledgers receive append-only CORRECTION events clarifying origin/main push completion.
A final git-state audit script exists and fails completed git-mode tasks with stale pending push metadata unless later corrected.
The audit script checks current working tree cleanliness and main/origin sync when run in finalize mode.
audit:harness or a documented npm command runs the new stale push metadata check.
A separate Tier 2 smoke Task attempts the real Generator -> Validator-A path and records artifacts or Resource Failure honestly.
All local audits pass before commit/merge/push.

positive: Keep smoke-test handoff minimal and free of secrets.
negative: Do not modify existing ledger events in place.
Do not expose environment variable values or tokens.
Do not treat Resource Failure as Validator FAIL.
